seoTitle: Mount Warning vs Mount Werong — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mount Warning and Mount Werong. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mount Warning vs Mount Werong: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mount Warning and Mount Werong.
heading: Mount Warning vs Mount Werong — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mount Warning, New South Wales and Mount Werong, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mount Werong has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Mount Warning (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mount Warning or Mount Werong safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mount Warning has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Mount Werong scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mount Warning scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Mount Werong scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mount Warning or Mount Werong?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mount Werong has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
